Science.skill: Simple techniques will be introduced to extract answers from asked questions. For instance, how to identify substances derived from colored flowers and how to determine whether green leaves contain chlorophyll.

SST.skill: Explain the causes of forest fires, landslides, man-made disasters, and ways to mitigate disasters.

Odia.skill: Read other materials alongside your textbook (such as children literature, main news articles, magazines, posters, etc.) and gain an understanding of them.
Explain the meanings of unfamiliar words from word lists
Use correct grammar in framing sentences in Language use appropriate word to frame sentences
While reading any text, understand the author’s viewpoint and express its similarities and dissimilarities based on your own experiences.
Interprets quotations, sayings and proverb etc.
Reads textual/non-textual materials in Language/ Braille with comprehension.

EVS.skill: Describe the various skills involved in daily life (such as farming, hunting, weaving, and handicrafts) along with the importance of training (the role of programs) in enhancing these skills.

Identify specific characteristics, such as shape (head, limbs, teeth, skin surface), habitat (whether domesticated or wild), fruits, vegetables, and spices, along with their life cycles, uses (such as for food, medicine, decoration, etc.), and sensory attributes (such as smell, taste, preferences).

Identify and differentiate between various items related to past and present (such as transportation, goods, homes, materials, tools, skills, agriculture, etc.) and provide insights regarding their origins.

Maths.skill: Recognize the structure of multiplication and division up to the 9-times table.
Understand, identify, and extend geometric patterns based on symmetry.
Using the divisibility rules for 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 9, and 11, determine the factors, prime factors, cube, and cube roots of the provided numbers.
Demonstrate mathematical operations used in daily life.
Understand and identify characteristics of four-sided shapes, including center, radius, and perimeter.
Determine the factors, prime factors, cube, and cube roots of the given numbers.

Science.skill: Understanding concepts related to environmental science, such as countering acidity in soil, conducting soil tests, and finding ways to prevent soil erosion.
Efforts will be made towards environmental protection, such as maintaining cleanliness in general places, reducing pollution-causing substances, and tree plantation to prevent soil erosion.

SST.skill: Discuss the factors affecting biodiversity in flora and fauna (such as climate change, soil erosion, etc.).

miscon.subject: EVS
miscon.stem: On a cold night, Reena wrapped one plant in a plastic sheet and left another open. In the morning she saw water droplets only on the plastic sheet. Which process best explains this?
miscon.text: Children chose evaporation. The droplets form by condensation, water vapour turning to liquid on the cool sheet.
miscon.skill: Identify situations related to various events, including estimating conditions (distance, weight, time duration) and using regional units of measurement (like yards, feet, miles) while establishing relationships between various causes and effects through simple techniques (examples - condensation, evaporation, separation, etc.) related to the lifespan of flowers, fruits, and other natural resources.

miscon.subject: SST
miscon.stem: ପାହାଡିଆ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ବାନାଗ୍ନି ସାଧାରଣ କାରଣ କେଉଁଟି ?

opts.A: ବିଜୁଳି ଦ୍ବାରା ଶୁଷ୍କ ଗଛରେ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିବ।
opts.B: ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ଢାଲୁ ନିଆଁ କୁ ବଢ଼ାଇବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ।
opts.C: ଲିଭି ନଥିବା ନିଆଁ କିମ୍ବା କ୍ୟାମ୍ପ ଅଗ୍ନି ରୁ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିବ।

miscon.text: Forest fires were blamed on lightning. The common cause in hilly areas is an unextinguished campfire, that is, human carelessness.
miscon.skill: Explain the causes of forest fires, landslides, man-made disasters, and ways to mitigate disasters.

miscon.subject: Odia
miscon.stem: “କଲମର କାହାଣୀ” ଅନୁଛେଦ ଦ୍ୱାରା ମାନବ ପ୍ରଗତି ବିଷୟରେ କେଉଁ ବିଶାଳ ଧାରଣାକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରାଯାଇଛି?

opts.A: ନିରନ୍ତର ନବୀନତା ଦିବାନିଶି ସମସ୍ୟା ସମାଧାନ କରି ଜୀବନକୁ ଭଲ କରିଥାଏ।
opts.B: ଆଧୁନିକ ପ୍ରଯୁକ୍ତିବିଦ୍ୟା  ସବୁ ପୁରୁଣା ଉଦ୍ଭାବନକୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାବେ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରେ।
opts.C: ନୂଆ ଉପକରଣ ତିଆରିରେ ସୃଜନଶୀଳତା ଠାରୁ ପାରମ୍ପରିକତା ଅଧିକ ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ।
opts.D: ଅଧିକାଂଶ ଉଦ୍ଭାବନ ଆକସ୍ମିକ ଭାବେ ଘଟେ ଓ ତାହାର କୌଣସି ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ ନଥାଏ।

miscon.text: Children picked an absolute statement (new technology fully replaces the old) over the passage's nuanced idea that steady, ongoing innovation keeps improving life.
miscon.skill: By studying a subject, comprehend the concepts that may exist within it.

miscon.subject: Odia
miscon.stem: ଜଙ୍ଗଲ କ୍ଷୟ ର ମୂଖ୍ୟ କାରଣ କଣ ହୋଇଛି?

opts.A: ନୂଆଁ କାରଖାନା ଓ ଶିଳ୍ପ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ସ୍ଥାପନ।
opts.B: ଜଙ୍ଗଲକୁ ଘରବାଡ଼ିରେ ପରିଣତ କରି ଶହର ବିସ୍ତାର।
opts.C: ଚାଷଜମି ବଢ଼ାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଶୁନ୍ୟ କରିବା

miscon.text: Deforestation was blamed on factories and industry. The main cause is clearing forest to expand farmland.
miscon.skill: By studying a subject, comprehend the concepts that may exist within it.

miscon.subject: Science
miscon.stem: ଜଣେ ଛାତ୍ର ଏକ ପରୀକ୍ଷଣ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରି ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରିବାକୁ ଚାହାଁନ୍ତି ଯେ ଏକ ସବୁଜ ପତ୍ର କ୍ଲୋରୋଫିଲ୍ ସାହାଯ୍ୟରେ ଖାଦ୍ୟ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ କରିଛି କି ନାହିଁ । କେଉଁଟି ସୋପାନଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସଠିକ୍ କ୍ରମ ଅଟେ?
miscon.text: Children picked 'keep it in sunlight', confusing the plant's need for light with the starch-test procedure, which begins by boiling the leaf.
miscon.skill: Simple techniques will be introduced to extract answers from asked questions. For instance, how to identify substances derived from colored flowers and how to determine whether green leaves contain chlorophyll.
